text: Any violation of any provision of this division may be enjoined in a civil action brought by the Attorney General in the name of the people of the State of California, upon request of the department, except that it shall not be necessary to show lack of adequate remedy at law or to show irreparable damage or loss.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 14.1. TRANSPORTATION OF HAZARDOUS MATERIAL [32000 - 32053]
### Chapter 1. Licensing [32000 - 32004]
##### § 32004

Any violation of any provision of this division may be enjoined in a civil action brought by the Attorney General in the name of the people of the State of California, upon request of the department, except that it shall not be necessary to show lack of adequate remedy at law or to show irreparable damage or loss.

*(Added by Stats. 1981, Ch. 860, Sec. 13.)*

subsections.text: Any violation of any provision of this division may be enjoined in a civil action brought by the Attorney General in the name of the people of the State of California, upon request of the department, except that it shall not be necessary to show lack of adequate remedy at law or to show irreparable damage or loss.
